title: Visible Ancient Debris
body:
Makes Ancient Debris More Visible!

Gives ancient debris the same colour as diamond. If paired with a no fog texture pack, you can easily find ancient debris in lava lakes. 

### Without Visible Ancient Debris and No Fog
![Without Visible Ancient Debris and No Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec909d71c835e58a8b83692d0928478e07016730.png)

### With No Fog
![With No Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d36d6bd9a73bea818d5f55d67d2353b77d8342.jpeg)

### With Visible Ancient Debris And No Fog
![With Visible Ancient Debris And No Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e5a1af888c68dca00fba57731d8b75d7364599a.jpeg)
